languages.text: {n}Лейтенант-хирургеон заляпан кровью с ног до головы — но ран на нем самом не видно.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, я вам жизнью обязан. Спасибо... и слава фон Валанциусам".

{n}The lieutenant-chirurgeon is splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to House von Valancius."
languages.original_text: {n}Лейтенант-хирургеон заляпан кровью с ног до головы — но ран на нем самом не видно.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, я вам жизнью обязан. Спасибо... и слава фон Валанциусам".

traits.locale_text: {n}The lieutenant-chirurgeonis splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to the House of von Valancius."

{n}The lieutenant-chirurgeonis splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to the House of von Valancius."

{n}The lieutenant-chirurgeon is splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to House von Valancius."

{n}The lieutenant-chirurgeon is splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to House von Valancius."

languages.text: {n}那位船医中尉从头到脚都沾满了鲜血，但他本人似乎并未受伤。{/n}“大人，我的命是您给的。感谢您……荣耀归于冯·瓦兰修斯家族。”
languages.original_text: {n}The lieutenant-chirurgeon is splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}那位船医中尉从头到脚都沾满了鲜血，但他本人似乎并未受伤。{/n}“大人，我的命是您给的。感谢您……荣耀归于冯·瓦兰修斯家族。”

languages.text: {n}Cerrah Teğmen, tepeden tırnağa kana bulanmış. Ancak kendisi yara almamış gibi görünüyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, hayatımı size borçluyum. Teşekkürler... Von Valancius Hanesi çok yaşa."
languages.original_text: {n}The lieutenant-chirurgeon is splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Cerrah Teğmen, tepeden tırnağa kana bulanmış. Ancak kendisi yara almamış gibi görünüyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, hayatımı size borçluyum. Teşekkürler... Von Valancius Hanesi çok yaşa."

languages.text: {n}Le lieutenant-chirurgeon est couvert de sang de la tête aux pieds, mais il ne semble pas blessé.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, je vous dois la vie. Merci... et gloire à la maison von Valancius. »
languages.original_text: {n}The lieutenant-chirurgeon is splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le lieutenant-chirurgeon est couvert de sang de la tête aux pieds, mais il ne semble pas blessé.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, je vous dois la vie. Merci... et gloire à la maison von Valancius. »

languages.text: {n}El teniente cirujano está cubierto de sangre de la cabeza a los pies, pero no parece estar herido.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, le debo mi vida. Gracias... y gloria a la casa von Valancius».
languages.original_text: {n}The lieutenant-chirurgeon is splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}El teniente cirujano está cubierto de sangre de la cabeza a los pies, pero no parece estar herido.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, le debo mi vida. Gracias... y gloria a la casa von Valancius».

languages.text: {n}Der Lieutenant-Chirurgeum ist von Kopf bis Fuß mit Blut beschmiert, scheint selbst aber unverletzt zu sein.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich verdanke Euch mein Leben. Danke ... und lang lebe Haus von Valancius!"
languages.original_text: {n}The lieutenant-chirurgeon is splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Lieutenant-Chirurgeum ist von Kopf bis Fuß mit Blut beschmiert, scheint selbst aber unverletzt zu sein.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich verdanke Euch mein Leben. Danke ... und lang lebe Haus von Valancius!"

languages.text: {n}副官付き外科医は頭から爪先まで血しぶきを浴びている――だが、彼自身は無傷のようだ。{/n}「{mf|閣下|閣下}、命を救っていただいた。感謝を…そしてヴァランシウス家に栄光あれ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The lieutenant-chirurgeon is splattered with blood from head to toe — yet he himself appears to be uninjured.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I owe you my life. Thank you... and glory to House von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: {n}副官付き外科医は頭から爪先まで血しぶきを浴びている――だが、彼自身は無傷のようだ。{/n}「{mf|閣下|閣下}、命を救っていただいた。感謝を…そしてヴァランシウス家に栄光あれ。」
